version: Exam questions align to the Summer ’25 Release.

testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Individuals who have broad knowledge of the Product-to-Cash lifecycle and hands-on experience using the Revenue Cloud platform on core. Candidates should generally have 2–3 years of Product-to-Cash domain experience.

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Explain how to configure foundational Salesforce features for Revenue Cloud, including flows, Lightning page components, permission set licenses, and permission sets.
Identify and describe Revenue Cloud features, such as Context Service, OmniStudio, Business Rules Engine (BRE), and application programming interfaces (APIs).
Design context-aware dashboards and key performance indicators (KPIs) using native Salesforce reporting tools.
Describe core Revenue Cloud fields, objects, and relationships between objects.
Plan implementation readiness, including required licenses, permission sets, and prerequisite feature toggles.
Assign roles and responsibilities to stakeholders for cross-cloud project execution.
Develop a Revenue Cloud scope of work and project plan.
Drive implementation through build, test, deployment, and adoption.
Explain Catalog Management core concepts and capabilities.
Given a scenario, implement a solution using the appropriate out-of-the-box Catalog Management functionality.
Use the Product Configurator tool to customize the components and attributes of a product and validate the configuration.
Configure and apply pricing procedures to customer-specific business cases.
Given a set of customer requirements, including using Agentforce, configure and generate an accurate pricing quote.
Given a scenario, configure Salesforce Contracts to meet business requirements.
Given a scenario, configure Order Management to meet business requirements.
Explain Asset Management core concepts and capabilities.
Given a scenario, implement a solution using the appropriate out-of-the-box Asset Management functionality.
Explain Invoice Management core concepts and capabilities.
Given a scenario, implement a solution using the appropriate out-of-the-box Invoice Management functionality.

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam guides with sample questions on each credential page
